session.user: Run pytest on packages/erk-mcp/tests/test_server.py and report results. Just run the command and report what passes/fails.
session.assistant: I'll run pytest on the specified test file and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest on test_server.py with verbose output

session.tool_result:
